ui.tier1_done_body: Based on your quick assessment, we've matched you to career pathways. You can see your results now, or sharpen them with ~20 more questions (~5 min).
ui.tier2_done_title: Your career rankings are locked in
ui.tier2_done_body: You've answered all the questions that determine your pathway scores. You can see your results now — or unlock a significantly richer, more personalised report.
ui.welcome_body: We'll start with 18 quick questions (~5 min) to show you which careers fit. Then you decide how deep to go.
ui.welcome_step1: Step 1: Quick Match (5 min). 18 questions to get your initial career pathway rankings.
ui.welcome_step2: Step 2: Sharpen (5 min, optional). 20 more questions that fully score all skills, preferences, and constraints.
ui.welcome_step3: Step 3: Personalise (~10 min, optional). 40 focused questions that add background context for a richer AI-written career report.
ui.required_missing: {n} required question(s) still need an answer.
ui.questionnaire_complete_body: You've answered all the questions. Your AI career coach is now fully briefed on your profile and ready to help.
ui.upgrade_body: You've completed Stage 1 and your top career pathways are matched. Upgrade to Pro to continue with Stages 2 & 3, unlock your full career analysis, AI career coach, and action plan.
ui.upgrade_note: Pro unlocks Stages 2 & 3, full career analysis, AI coach, and action plan.

dashboard.subtitle_returning: Your career journey at a glance. Pick up where you left off.
dashboard.q_all_done: All 3 stages complete. Your AI report has maximum detail. Review or update your answers any time.
dashboard.q_t2_done_pro: Stages 1 & 2 complete. Personalise your report with Stage 3 (~40 questions, ~10 min).
dashboard.q_t2_done_free: Stages 1 & 2 complete. Upgrade to Pro to personalise your report with Stage 3.
dashboard.q_t1_done_pro: Stage 1 complete. Answer ~20 more questions in Stage 2 to unlock full career analysis.
dashboard.q_t1_done_free: Stage 1 complete. Upgrade to Pro to continue with Stage 2 and unlock your full career analysis.
dashboard.q_not_started: Start with 18 quick questions (~5 min) to discover your best career pathways.
dashboard.summary_ready: Your personal narrative summary is ready.
dashboard.summary_generate: Stage 1 is done — your profile summary is ready to generate.
dashboard.summary_locked: Complete Stage 1 (18 questions) to unlock your profile summary.
dashboard.analysis_upgrade: Upgrade to Pro to unlock your full AI-powered career analysis — ranked pathways, salary data, and a transition plan.
dashboard.analysis_ready: Your full career analysis is ready — ranked pathways, salary data, credentials, and a transition plan.
dashboard.analysis_generate: Stages 1 & 2 are done — generate your AI-powered pathway rankings, salary benchmarks, and transition plan.
dashboard.analysis_locked: Complete Stages 1 & 2 of the questionnaire to unlock your full career analysis.
dashboard.plan_upgrade: Upgrade to Pro to get a structured action plan with trackable next steps for your top career pathways.
dashboard.plan_ready: Your step-by-step action plan — track credentials, weekly priorities, and first steps for your top pathways.
dashboard.plan_locked: Generate your career analysis first to unlock a structured action plan with trackable next steps.
dashboard.coach_upgrade: Upgrade to Pro to chat with your AI career coach — personalised advice on interviews, resumes, and your transition.
dashboard.coach_ready: Chat with your AI career coach — get personalised advice on interviews, resumes, salary negotiation, and your transition plan.

pricing.title: Simple pricing, full career clarity
pricing.subtitle: Start free to see your top pathways. Upgrade to Pro for the complete career transition toolkit.
pricing.free_desc: Discover your best career pathways in 5 minutes
pricing.cancel_note: Cancel anytime. Processed securely by LemonSqueezy.
pricing.promo_label: Have a discount or access code?
pricing.secure_payment_desc: Processed by LemonSqueezy. We never see your card details.
pricing.instant_access_desc: All Pro features unlock immediately after payment.
pricing.cancel_anytime_desc: No lock-in. Cancel your subscription whenever you want.
pricing.feat_full_analysis_salary: Complete career analysis with salary data

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start your career transition journey
register.account_ready: Your account is ready. Sign in to start your career assessment.
register.verification_sent: We've sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link in the email to activate your account, then sign in to get started.
register.verification_resent: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
register.resend_failed: Failed to resend. Please try again.

coach.title: Career Coach
coach.subtitle: Your AI career advisor — powered by your questionnaire data and career analysis.
coach.clear_confirm: Clear all chat history? This cannot be undone.
coach.no_goals: No goals yet. Set career goals to track your progress.
coach.empty_text: Ask me anything about your career transition — interview prep, resume tips, salary negotiation, skill gaps, or just talk through your next move.
coach.suggestion_1: What are my strongest transferable skills?
coach.suggestion_2: Help me prepare for a product manager interview
coach.suggestion_3: Review my career analysis — what should I focus on first?
coach.suggestion_4: What salary should I target in my top pathway?
coach.error_send: Failed to send message. Please try again.
coach.error_clear: Failed to clear history. Please try again.

plan.title: Your Action Plan
plan.generate_desc: Generate a structured action plan from your career analysis — concrete steps, credentials to pursue, and weekly priorities you can track.

summary.title: Your Career Profile Summary
summary.subtitle: A personalized reflection based on your questionnaire responses.
summary.generating_text: We're crafting a narrative based on everything you shared. This may take a moment.
summary.analysis_ready_text: Your career analysis report is ready with pathway rankings, salary data, and credential recommendations.
summary.analysis_generate_text: Your Career Analysis Report will score and rank specific career pathways based on your profile, with salary data, credential recommendations, and a realistic transition timeline.
summary.more_questions_note: Answering more questions will make your analysis richer and more personalised.
summary.sharpen_text: Answer ~20 more questions (~5 min) to fully score all your skills, preferences, and constraints. This unlocks the full Career Analysis Report with pathway rankings, salary data, and a transition plan.
summary.human_review_text: Get a personalized 45-minute session with a career advisor who will walk through your profile summary, validate the AI analysis, and help you build an actionable next-steps plan tailored to your situation.
summary.sessions_note: Available worldwide. Sessions conducted via Zoom.
summary.explore_coach_text: Chat with your AI Career Coach — ask questions about your profile, get interview advice, or plan your next move.
summary.generated_ai: This summary was generated using AI based on your responses.
summary.generated_plain: This summary was generated from your responses.

results.title: Your Career Analysis
results.disclaimer: This report is informational only. For visa/labor decisions, consult official sources in your country.
results.take_action_text: Turn this analysis into a step-by-step action plan — track credentials, first steps, and weekly priorities.
results.partial_data_text: Your report is based on partial questionnaire data. Answering more questions will make the recommendations more personalised and the analysis more confident. Your progress is saved — pick up where you left off.
